verses.latin_vulgate: His ita transactis, nuntiatum est Joseph quod ægrotaret pater suus : qui, assumptis duobus filiis Manasse et Ephraim, ire perrexit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֗י אַחֲרֵי֙ הַדְּבָרִ֣ים הָאֵ֔לֶּה וַיֹּ֣אמֶר לְיוֹסֵ֔ף הִנֵּ֥ה אָבִ֖יךָ חֹלֶ֑ה וַיִּקַּ֞ח אֶת־שְׁנֵ֤י בָנָיו֙ עִמּ֔וֹ אֶת־מְנַשֶּׁ֖ה וְאֶת־אֶפְרָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: After these things, it was told Joseph that his father was sick; and he set out to go to him, taking his two sons Manasses and Ephraim.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sitte sanottiin Josephille: katso, sinun isäs sairastaa. Ja hän otti molemmat poikansa kanssansa, Manassen ja Ephraimin.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass after these things, that one told Joseph, Behold, thy father is sick: and he took with him his two sons, Manasseh and Ephraim.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dictumque est seni : Ecce filius tuus Joseph venit ad te. Qui confortatus sedit in lectulo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּגֵּ֣ד לְיַעֲקֹ֔ב וַיֹּ֕אמֶר הִנֵּ֛ה בִּנְךָ֥ יוֹסֵ֖ף בָּ֣א אֵלֶ֑יךָ וַיִּתְחַזֵּק֙ יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וַיֵּ֖שֶׁב עַל־הַמִּטָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it was told the old man: Behold thy son Joseph cometh to thee. And being strengthened, he sat on his bed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Jakobille ilmoitettiin, sanoen: katso, sinun poikas Joseph tulee sinun tykös. Ja Israel vahvisti itsensä ja istui vuoteessa.
verses.king_james: And one told Jacob, and said, Behold, thy son Joseph cometh unto thee: and Israel strengthened himself, and sat upon the bed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ingresso ad se ait : Deus omnipotens apparuit mihi in Luza, quæ est in terra Chanaan : benedixitque mihi,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר יַעֲקֹב֙ אֶל־יוֹסֵ֔ף אֵ֥ל שַׁדַּ֛י נִרְאָֽה־אֵלַ֥י בְּל֖וּז בְּאֶ֣רֶץ כְּנָ֑עַן וַיְבָ֖רֶךְ אֹתִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when Joseph was come in to him, he said: God almighty appeared to me at Luza, which is in the land of Chanaan, and he blessed me,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Jakob sanoi Josephille: Jumala kaikkivaltias näkyi minulle Lutsissa Kanaanin maalla; ja siunasi minua.
verses.king_james: And Jacob said unto Joseph, God Almighty appeared unto me at Luz in the land of Canaan, and blessed me,

verses.latin_vulgate: et ait : Ego te augebo et multiplicabo, et faciam te in turbas populorum : daboque tibi terram hanc, et semini tuo post te in possessionem sempiternam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֵלַ֗י הִנְנִ֤י מַפְרְךָ֙ וְהִרְבִּיתִ֔ךָ וּנְתַתִּ֖יךָ לִקְהַ֣ל עַמִּ֑ים וְנָ֨תַתִּ֜י אֶת־הָאָ֧רֶץ הַזֹּ֛את לְזַרְעֲךָ֥ אַחֲרֶ֖יךָ אֲחֻזַּ֥ת עוֹלָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And said: I will cause thee to increase and multiply, and I will make of thee a multitude of people: and I will give this land to thee, and to thy seed after thee for an everlasting possession.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sanoi minulle: katso, minä annan sinun olla hedelmällisen ja lisääntyä, ja teen sinun paljoksi kansaksi; ja annan myös tämän maan sinun siemenelles sinun jälkees, ijankaikkiseksi perimiseksi.
verses.king_james: And said unto me, Behold, I will make thee fruitful, and multiply thee, and I will make of thee a multitude of people; and will give this land to thy seed after thee for an everlasting possession.

verses.latin_vulgate: Duo ergo filii tui, qui nati sunt tibi in terra Ægypti antequam huc venirem ad te, mei erunt : Ephraim et Manasses, sicut Ruben et Simeon reputabuntur mihi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֡ה שְׁנֵֽי־בָנֶ֩יךָ֩ הַנּוֹלָדִ֨ים לְךָ֜ בְּאֶ֣רֶץ מִצְרַ֗יִם עַד־בֹּאִ֥י אֵלֶ֛יךָ מִצְרַ֖יְמָה לִי־הֵ֑ם אֶפְרַ֙יִם֙ וּמְנַשֶּׁ֔ה כִּרְאוּבֵ֥ן וְשִׁמְע֖וֹן יִֽהְיוּ־לִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: So thy two sons, who were born to thee in the land of Egypt before I came hither to thee, shall be mine: Ephraim and Manasses shall be reputed to me as Ruben and Simeon.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nyt siis ne kaksi sinun poikaas, jotka sinulle ovat syntyneet Egyptissä, ennenkuin minä tulin tänne sinun tykös, pitää oleman minun; nimittäin Ephraim ja Manasse, niinkuin Ruben ja Simeon ovat minun.
verses.king_james: And now thy two sons, Ephraim and Manasseh, which were born unto thee in the land of Egypt before I came unto thee into Egypt, are mine; as Reuben and Simeon, they shall be mine.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reliquos autem quos genueris post eos, tui erunt, et nomine fratrum suorum vocabuntur in possessionibus suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמוֹלַדְתְּךָ֛ אֲשֶׁר־הוֹלַ֥דְתָּ אַחֲרֵיהֶ֖ם לְךָ֣ יִהְי֑וּ עַ֣ל שֵׁ֧ם אֲחֵיהֶ֛ם יִקָּרְא֖וּ בְּנַחֲלָתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: But the rest whom thou shalt have after them, shall be thine, and shall be called by the name of their brethren in their possessions.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta sinun lapses, jotkas siität niiden jälkeen, pitää oleman sinun, ja pitää nimitettämän veljeinsä nimellä, heidän perimisestänsä.
verses.king_james: And thy issue, which thou begettest after them, shall be thine, and shall be called after the name of their brethren in their inheritance.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mihi enim, quando veniebam de Mesopotamia, mortua est Rachel in terra Chanaan in ipso itinere, eratque vernum tempus : et ingrediebar Ephratam, et sepelivi eam juxta viam Ephratæ, quæ alio nomine appellatur Bethlehem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲנִ֣י ׀ בְּבֹאִ֣י מִפַּדָּ֗ן מֵ֩תָה֩ עָלַ֨י רָחֵ֜ל בְּאֶ֤רֶץ כְּנַ֙עַן֙ בַּדֶּ֔רֶךְ בְּע֥וֹד כִּבְרַת־אֶ֖רֶץ לָבֹ֣א אֶפְרָ֑תָה וָאֶקְבְּרֶ֤הָ שָּׁם֙ בְּדֶ֣רֶךְ אֶפְרָ֔ת הִ֖וא בֵּ֥ית לָֽחֶם׃
verses.douay_rheims: For, when I came out of Mesopotamia, Rachel died from me in the land of Chanaan in the very journey, and it was spring time: and I was going to Ephrata, and I buried her near the way of Ephrata, which by another name is called Bethlehem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja koska minä tulin Mesopotamiasta, kuoli minulta Rakel Kanaanin maalla, tiellä, koska vielä kappale matkaa oli Ephrataan; ja minä hautasin hänen siellä Ephratan tiellä, se on Betlehem.
verses.king_james: And as for me, when I came from Padan, Rachel died by me in the land of Canaan in the way, when yet there was but a little way to come unto Ephrath: and I buried her there in the way of Ephrath; the same is Beth–lehem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Videns autem filios ejus dixit ad eum : Qui sunt isti ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֥רְא יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל אֶת־בְּנֵ֣י יוֹסֵ֑ף וַיֹּ֖אמֶר מִי־אֵֽלֶּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then seeing his sons, he said to him: Who are these?
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Israel näki Josephin pojat, ja sanoi: kutka nämät ovat?
verses.king_james: And Israel beheld Joseph’s sons, and said, Who are these?

verses.latin_vulgate: Respondit : Filii mei sunt, quos donavit mihi Deus in hoc loco. Adduc, inquit, eos ad me, ut benedicam illis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר יוֹסֵף֙ אֶל־אָבִ֔יו בָּנַ֣י הֵ֔ם אֲשֶׁר־נָֽתַן־לִ֥י אֱלֹהִ֖ים בָּזֶ֑ה וַיֹּאמַ֕ר קָֽחֶם־נָ֥א אֵלַ֖י וַאֲבָרְכֵֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: He answered: They are my sons, whom God hath given me in this place. And he said: Bring them to me, that I may bless them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Joseph vastasi isäänsä: ne ovat minun poikani, jotka Jumala on minulle täällä antanut. Ja hän sanoi: tuos heitä minun tyköni siunatakseni heitä.
verses.king_james: And Joseph said unto his father, They are my sons, whom God hath given me in this place. And he said, Bring them, I pray thee, unto me, and I will bless them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Oculi enim Israël caligabant præ nimia senectute, et clare videre non poterat. Applicitosque ad se, deosculatus et circumplexus eos,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעֵינֵ֤י יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ כָּבְד֣וּ מִזֹּ֔קֶן לֹ֥א יוּכַ֖ל לִרְא֑וֹת וַיַּגֵּ֤שׁ אֹתָם֙ אֵלָ֔יו וַיִּשַּׁ֥ק לָהֶ֖ם וַיְחַבֵּ֥ק לָהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: For Israel's eyes were dim by reason of his great age, and he could not see clearly. And when they were brought to him, he kissed and embraced them,
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Israelin silmät olivat pimiät vanhuudesta, eikä taitanut hyvin nähdä. Ja hän vei heidät hänen tykönsä. Ja hän antoi suuta heidän, ja otti heitä syliinsä.
verses.king_james: Now the eyes of Israel were dim for age, so that he could not see. And he brought them near unto him; and he kissed them, and embraced them.

verses.latin_vulgate: dixit ad filium suum : Non sum fraudatus aspectu tuo : insuper ostendit mihi Deus semen tuum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ אֶל־יוֹסֵ֔ף רְאֹ֥ה פָנֶ֖יךָ לֹ֣א פִלָּ֑לְתִּי וְהִנֵּ֨ה הֶרְאָ֥ה אֹתִ֛י אֱלֹהִ֖ים גַּ֥ם אֶת־זַרְעֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And said to his son: I am not deprived of seeing thee; moreover God hath shewn me thy seed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Israel sanoi Josephille: en minä ajatellut nähdä sinun kasvojas, ja katso, Jumala on antanut minun myös nähdä sinun siemenes.
verses.king_james: And Israel said unto Joseph, I had not thought to see thy face: and, lo, God hath shewed me also thy seed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque tulisset eos Joseph de gremio patris, adoravit pronus in terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיּוֹצֵ֥א יוֹסֵ֛ף אֹתָ֖ם מֵעִ֣ם בִּרְכָּ֑יו וַיִּשְׁתַּ֥חוּ לְאַפָּ֖יו אָֽרְצָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when Joseph had taken them from his father's lap, he bowed down with his face to the ground.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Joseph otti heidät pois hänen sylistänsä, ja kumarsi itsiänsä maahan hänen kasvoinsa eteen.
verses.king_james: And Joseph brought them out from between his knees, and he bowed himself with his face to the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et posuit Ephraim ad dexteram suam, id est, ad sinistram Israël : Manassen vero in sinistra sua, ad dexteram scilicet patris, applicuitque ambos ad eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקַּ֣ח יוֹסֵף֮ אֶת־שְׁנֵיהֶם֒ אֶת־אֶפְרַ֤יִם בִּֽימִינוֹ֙ מִשְּׂמֹ֣אל יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וְאֶת־מְנַשֶּׁ֥ה בִשְׂמֹאל֖וֹ מִימִ֣ין יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וַיַּגֵּ֖שׁ אֵלָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he set Ephraim on his right hand, that is, towards the left hand of Israel; but Manasses on his left hand, to wit, towards his father's right hand, and brought them near to him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Joseph otti heidät molemmat, Ephraimin oikiaan käteensä, jonka hän asetti Israelin vasemmalle kädelle, ja Manassen vasempaan käteensä, Israelin oikialle kädelle, ja vei heidät hänen tykönsä.
verses.king_james: And Joseph took them both, Ephraim in his right hand toward Israel’s left hand, and Manasseh in his left hand toward Israel’s right hand, and brought them near unto him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui extendens manum dexteram, posuit super caput Ephraim minoris fratris : sinistram autem super caput Manasse qui major natu erat, commutans manus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁלַח֩ יִשְׂרָאֵ֨ל אֶת־יְמִינ֜וֹ וַיָּ֨שֶׁת עַל־רֹ֤אשׁ אֶפְרַ֙יִם֙ וְה֣וּא הַצָּעִ֔יר וְאֶת־שְׂמֹאל֖וֹ עַל־רֹ֣אשׁ מְנַשֶּׁ֑ה שִׂכֵּל֙ אֶת־יָדָ֔יו כִּ֥י מְנַשֶּׁ֖ה הַבְּכֽוֹר׃
verses.douay_rheims: But he, stretching forth his right hand, put it upon the head of Ephraim, the younger brother; and the left upon the head of Manasses, who was the elder, changing his hands.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Israel ojensi oikian kätensä, ja laski Ephraimin pään päälle, joka oli nuorempi, mutta vasemman kätensä Manassen pään päälle, ja muutti tiettävästi kätensä; sillä Manasse oli esikoinen.
verses.king_james: And Israel stretched out his right hand, and laid it upon Ephraim’s head, who was the younger, and his left hand upon Manasseh’s head, guiding his hands wittingly; for Manasseh was the firstborn.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedixitque Jacob filiis Joseph, et ait : Deus, in cujus conspectu ambulaverunt patres mei Abraham, et Isaac ; Deus qui pascit me ab adolescentia mea usque in præsentem diem :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְבָ֥רֶךְ אֶת־יוֹסֵ֖ף וַיֹּאמַ֑ר הָֽאֱלֹהִ֡ים אֲשֶׁר֩ הִתְהַלְּכ֨וּ אֲבֹתַ֤י לְפָנָיו֙ אַבְרָהָ֣ם וְיִצְחָ֔ק הָֽאֱלֹהִים֙ הָרֹעֶ֣ה אֹתִ֔י מֵעוֹדִ֖י עַד־הַיּ֥וֹם הַזֶּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Jacob blessed the sons of Joseph, and said: God, in whose sight my fathers Abraham and Isaac walked, God that feedeth me from my youth until this day:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän siunasi Josephia, ja sanoi: Jumala, jonka kasvoin edessä minun isäni Abraham ja Isaak vaeltaneet ovat, Jumala, joka minun kainnut on minun elinaikanani tähän päivään asti.
verses.king_james: And he blessed Joseph, and said, God, before whom my fathers Abraham and Isaac did walk, the God which fed me all my life long unto this day,

verses.latin_vulgate: angelus, qui eruit me de cunctis malis, benedicat pueris istis : et invocetur super eos nomen meum, nomina quoque patrum meorum Abraham et Isaac, et crescant in multitudinem super terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַמַּלְאָךְ֩ הַגֹּאֵ֨ל אֹתִ֜י מִכׇּל־רָ֗ע יְבָרֵךְ֮ אֶת־הַנְּעָרִים֒ וְיִקָּרֵ֤א בָהֶם֙ שְׁמִ֔י וְשֵׁ֥ם אֲבֹתַ֖י אַבְרָהָ֣ם וְיִצְחָ֑ק וְיִדְגּ֥וּ לָרֹ֖ב בְּקֶ֥רֶב הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The angel that delivereth me from all evils, bless these boys: and let my name be called upon them, and the names of my fathers Abraham and Isaac; and may they grow into a multitude upon the earth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Enkeli, joka minun pelastanut on kaikesta pahasta, siunatkoon näitä nuorukaisia, että he nimitettäisiin minun ja minun isäini, Abrahamin, ja Isaakin nimellä, ja kasvaisivat aivan paljoksi maan päällä.
verses.king_james: The Angel which redeemed me from all evil, bless the lads; and let my name be named on them, and the name of my fathers Abraham and Isaac; and let them grow into a multitude in the midst of the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Videns autem Joseph quod posuisset pater suus dexteram manum super caput Ephraim, graviter accepit : et apprehensam manum patris levare conatus est de capite Ephraim, et transferre super caput Manasse.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֣רְא יוֹסֵ֗ף כִּי־יָשִׁ֨ית אָבִ֧יו יַד־יְמִינ֛וֹ עַל־רֹ֥אשׁ אֶפְרַ֖יִם וַיֵּ֣רַע בְּעֵינָ֑יו וַיִּתְמֹ֣ךְ יַד־אָבִ֗יו לְהָסִ֥יר אֹתָ֛הּ מֵעַ֥ל רֹאשׁ־אֶפְרַ֖יִם עַל־רֹ֥אשׁ מְנַשֶּֽׁה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Joseph seeing that his father had put his right hand upon the head of Ephraim, was much displeased: and taking his father's hand, he tried to lift it from Ephraim's head, and to remove it to the head of Manasses.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta koska Joseph näki isänsä laskevan oikian kätensä Ephraimin pään päälle, otti hän sen pahaksi, ja rupesi isänsä käteen, siirtääksensä Ephraimin pään päältä Manassen pään päälle.
verses.king_james: And when Joseph saw that his father laid his right hand upon the head of Ephraim, it displeased him: and he held up his father’s hand, to remove it from Ephraim’s head unto Manasseh’s head.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque ad patrem : Non ita convenit, pater : quia hic est primogenitus, pone dexteram tuam super caput ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֧אמֶר יוֹסֵ֛ף אֶל־אָבִ֖יו לֹא־כֵ֣ן אָבִ֑י כִּי־זֶ֣ה הַבְּכֹ֔ר שִׂ֥ים יְמִינְךָ֖ עַל־רֹאשֽׁוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he said to his father: It should not be so, my father; for this is the firstborn, put thy right hand upon his head.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sanoi Joseph isällensä: ei niin minun isäni; tämä on esikoinen, laske oikia kätes hänen päänsä päälle.
verses.king_james: And Joseph said unto his father, Not so, my father: for this is the firstborn; put thy right hand upon his head.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui renuens, ait : Scio, fili mi, scio : et iste quidem erit in populos, et multiplicabitur : sed frater ejus minor, major erit illo : et semen illius crescet in gentes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְמָאֵ֣ן אָבִ֗יו וַיֹּ֙אמֶר֙ יָדַ֤עְתִּֽי בְנִי֙ יָדַ֔עְתִּי גַּם־ה֥וּא יִֽהְיֶה־לְּעָ֖ם וְגַם־ה֣וּא יִגְדָּ֑ל וְאוּלָ֗ם אָחִ֤יו הַקָּטֹן֙ יִגְדַּ֣ל מִמֶּ֔נּוּ וְזַרְע֖וֹ יִהְיֶ֥ה מְלֹֽא־הַגּוֹיִֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: But he refusing, said: I know, my son, I know: and this also shall become a people, and shall be multiplied; but his younger brother shall be greater than he; and his seed shall grow into nations.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta hänen isänsä kielsi sen, ja sanoi: minä tiedän kyllä, minun poikani, minä tiedän: tämä myös tulee suureksi kansaksi; mutta kuitenkin hänen nuorempi veljensä tulee suuremmaksi kuin hän, ja hänen siemenensä tulee suureksi kansain paljoudeksi.
verses.king_james: And his father refused, and said, I know it, my son, I know it: he also shall become a people, and he also shall be great: but truly his younger brother shall be greater than he, and his seed shall become a multitude of nations.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedixitque eis in tempore illo, dicens : In te benedicetur Israël, atque dicetur : Faciat tibi Deus sicut Ephraim, et sicut Manasse. Constituitque Ephraim ante Manassen.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְבָ֨רְכֵ֜ם בַּיּ֣וֹם הַהוּא֮ לֵאמוֹר֒ בְּךָ֗ יְבָרֵ֤ךְ יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ לֵאמֹ֔ר יְשִֽׂמְךָ֣ אֱלֹהִ֔ים כְּאֶפְרַ֖יִם וְכִמְנַשֶּׁ֑ה וַיָּ֥שֶׂם אֶת־אֶפְרַ֖יִם לִפְנֵ֥י מְנַשֶּֽׁה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he blessed them at that time, saying: In thee shall Israel be blessed, and it shall be said: God do to thee as to Ephraim, and as to Manasses. And he set Ephraim before Manasses.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin hän siunasi heitä sinä päivänä, sanoen: joka tahtoo jonkun siunata Israelissa, niin sanokaan näin: Jumala tehköön sinun niinkuin Ephraimin ja Manassen. Ja niin asetti hän Ephraimin Manassen edelle.
verses.king_james: And he blessed them that day, saying, In thee shall Israel bless, saying, God make thee as Ephraim and as Manasseh: and he set Ephraim before Manasseh.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ait ad Joseph filium suum : En ego morior, et erit Deus vobiscum, reducetque vos ad terram patrum vestrorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ אֶל־יוֹסֵ֔ף הִנֵּ֥ה אָנֹכִ֖י מֵ֑ת וְהָיָ֤ה אֱלֹהִים֙ עִמָּכֶ֔ם וְהֵשִׁ֣יב אֶתְכֶ֔ם אֶל־אֶ֖רֶץ אֲבֹתֵיכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he said to Joseph, his son: Behold I die, and God will be with you, and will bring you back into the land of your fathers.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Israel sanoi Josephille: katso minä kuolen; ja Jumala on teidän kanssanne, ja vie teitä jällensä teidän isäinne maalle.
verses.king_james: And Israel said unto Joseph, Behold, I die: but God shall be with you, and bring you again unto the land of your fathers.

verses.latin_vulgate: Do tibi partem unam extra fratres tuos, quam tuli de manu Amorrhæi in gladio et arcu meo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲנִ֞י נָתַ֧תִּֽי לְךָ֛ שְׁכֶ֥ם אַחַ֖ד עַל־אַחֶ֑יךָ אֲשֶׁ֤ר לָקַ֙חְתִּי֙ מִיַּ֣ד הָֽאֱמֹרִ֔י בְּחַרְבִּ֖י וּבְקַשְׁתִּֽי׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: I give thee a portion above thy brethren, which I took out of the hand of the Amorrhite with my sword and bow.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä olen myös antanut sinulle osan maata, päälle sinun veljeis osan, jonka minä miekallani ja joutsellani Amorilaisten käsistä ottanut olen.
verses.king_james: Moreover I have given to thee one portion above thy brethren, which I took out of the hand of the Amorite with my sword and with my bow.
